events.title: Iranian Drones and Missiles Strike Prince Sultan Air Base
events.desc: Iranian drones and missiles struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This follows earlier attacks that also damaged KC-135s at the same base, indicating a sustained Iranian counterair campaign.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: US Republicans Block Resolution to End Iran Attacks
events.desc: House Republicans blocked a Democratic attempt to pass a resolution ending U.S. military operations against Iran. This action signifies the ongoing political division regarding the war powers and the continuation of U.S. involvement in the conflict.

events.title: Israel Conducts Massive Strikes on Lebanon Following Ceasefire Announcement
events.desc: Hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced, Israel unleashed a large wave of strikes across Lebanon, hitting Beirut's southern suburbs, southern Lebanon, and the eastern Bekaa Valley. These attacks resulted in significant casualties and destruction, raising questions about the scope and inclusivity of the ceasefire.

events.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Takes Effect Amid Lingering Tensions
events.desc: A two-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran has been announced, aiming to de-escalate the ongoing conflict. However, maritime traffic in the Strait of Hormuz remains cautious, and tensions persist, suggesting the fragility of the truce.

events.title: Scale of Beirut Destruction Revealed After Israeli Strikes
events.desc: The extent of damage in Beirut following recent Israeli strikes has become apparent. The attacks underscore the devastating impact of the conflict on urban centers.

events.title: Hezbollah Rejects Direct Negotiations with Israel
events.desc: A Hezbollah lawmaker stated that the group rejects direct negotiations with Israel, emphasizing that the Lebanese government should demand a ceasefire as a precondition for any further talks. This stance highlights the complex political landscape surrounding potential de-escalation efforts.

events.title: Israel to Hold Direct Talks with Lebanon
events.desc: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced plans for Israel to begin direct peace talks with Lebanon, focusing on disarming Hezbollah and establishing peaceful relations. This initiative comes after a significant wave of Israeli strikes on Lebanon.

events.title: UN Envoy Meets Iranian Deputy Minister, Visits Damaged Sites in Tehran
events.desc: UN envoy Jean Arnault met with Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister Majid Takht-Ravanchi in Tehran as part of UN efforts to end the war. Arnault also visited civilian sites damaged by recent air strikes, underscoring the humanitarian impact of the conflict.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their associated passwords have been leaked online. The breach affects most ministries and raises significant concerns about the security of sensitive government data.

events.title: Pakistan's High-Stakes Bid to Broker Iran Peace Deal
events.desc: Pakistan is under significant pressure to mediate a peace deal between Iran and the United States. This diplomatic effort is fraught with risk, given the potential for increased instability along Pakistan's borders.

events.title: US Military Employed Mines in Southern Iran
events.desc: Evidence suggests the US military deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over a village in southern Iran, resulting in casualties. This deployment aligns with known US military capabilities used in the conflict.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing Revealed at Iran School Strike
events.desc: New videos have been geolocated and verified, showing two distinct waves of missile strikes on an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. The footage provides further details on the attack.

events.title: Iran Claims US Scattered Mines Over Village
events.desc: Iran alleges that the US deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over the village of Kafari, resulting in fatalities. Experts indicate the munitions match US-made anti-tank mines.

events.title: UK Tracks Russian Submarines During Covert Operation
events.desc: The UK's defense minister reported tracking three Russian submarines during a covert operation. The operation did not find evidence of damage to undersea infrastructure.

events.title: Dozens of States Condemn Attacks on UN Peacekeepers in Lebanon
events.desc: Sixty-three countries and the European Union issued a joint statement condemning 'unacceptable aggressive behavior' towards UN peacekeepers in Lebanon, following the deaths of three Indonesian soldiers. They also expressed concern over the humanitarian situation and destruction.
